Warmachine

Free and premium multipage themes and UI Kits

Details

Category

Tabletop Miniatures Game

Average Cost of a Full Army

$400-$600

Game Length

2-3 Hours

Army Size

10-50 Minis

Players

2-4, 2 is best

Visit the official website for Warmachine

Warmachine is a fast-paced tabletop miniatures game that plunges players into a world of intense tactical combat and strategic planning. Set in the steampunk-inspired Iron Kingdoms, players command powerful warcasters and their mighty warjacks—mechanized constructs armed with devastating weaponry. Each faction boasts its unique abilities, units, and strategies, offering endless variety and replayability. With its rich lore, detailed miniatures, and competitive gameplay, Warmachine provides an exhilarating experience for both seasoned veterans and newcomers to the miniature wargaming scene. Dive into the battlefield and prove your prowess in this dynamic and engaging game of strategy and warfare.

Highlights:

  • d6 Combat & resource management system
  • Dieselpunk Aesthetic in mostly 32mm scale
  • Official minis are 3D printed but no STLs are available
  • Privateer Press Sold Warmachine to Steam Forged Games in 2024
  • Played on a 4x4 area with a yearly scenario packet called Steam Roller
  • A robust Community Finder

  • Buzzard’s Trading Post

State of the Game

If you are a returning player or have been out of the loop, a lot has changed for Warmahordes. The game is in its 4th version of rules, previously called Mk4. Now the game is just called Warmachine and there is no Hordes designation.

If you want to jump right in download the 100% free app and get started rolling dice.

The game itself has split into two different formats – Prime and Unlimited. Prime is the current up-to-date competitive format and contains both the new Factions created for mk4 and a selection of mk3 faction army lists, essentially themes from mk3. Unlimited contains rules for all of the mk3 models. Most tournaments and steamrollers are held in the Prime format. Currently all of the new MK4 factions are entirely 3d printed, with no option to buy STLs and print them yourself. Every legacy faction is now out of print, but the community has been assured that the army lists in the Prime format will receive balance updates.

A quick touch on the balance updates – every January the game receives the balance update for the year where rules are updated and nerfs and buffs are handed out.

If you are a new player, coming in Q4 of 2024 a new plastic starter set is coming from Steamforged games.

Privateer Press recently (Q3 of 2024) sold everything Warmachine related to Steamforged Games. Steamforged games is doing their best to improve the manufacturing and distribution pipeline for warmachine.
